ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "team_home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_away_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, live, completed) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* The type of sport */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* The expected duration of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* The type of event (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_home_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_away_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_away_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the team belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* The type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being broadcasted */,
  "stream_url" TEXT /* URL for the live stream */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the broadcast */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the broadcast */,
  "broadcast_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the broadcast */,
  "broadcaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcaster */,
  "broadcast_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the broadcast (e.g., HD, SD) */,
  "broadcast_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived video */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event archived */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL for the archived video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "archive_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the archived video */,
  "archive_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the archived video (e.g., HD, SD) */,
  "archive_views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the archived video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_archives_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event scheduled */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue hosting the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the schedule */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., confirmed, tentative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, admin) */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notifications the user wants to receive */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite team */,
  "favorite_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite venue */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_favorite_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_favorite_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, stream) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event statistic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  "viewer_count" INTEGER /* Number of viewers watching the event */,
  "revenue_generated" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  "average_viewing_duration" TEXT /* Average duration viewers watched the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
